name: 🤖 AI SDR BR - Parte 1: Qualificação via WhatsApp

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json._phone, text: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json._reply }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json.Phone, name: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json.Name, company: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json.Company, cnpj: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json.CNPJ, productInterest: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json.ProductInterest, budget: $('Parsear Resposta IA').first().json.Budget, instance: $('Extrair Contexto').first().json.instance }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ number: $('Extrair Contexto').first().json.phone, options: { presence: 'composing', delay: 5000 } }) }}
